description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile sports car with an aggressive aerodynamic design, finished in a metallic gold color with black accents. The car features sharp, angular lines along the body, a prominent rear spoiler, and large air intakes on the sides for enhanced cooling and performance. The windows are tinted black, and the roofline is low, emphasizing its high-speed capabilities. The rear of the car showcases a vented engine cover and a pronounced diffuser, while the front is characterized by sharp headlights and a pointed nose. The wheels are large, black, and feature a multi-spoke design, adding to the car's sporty appearance. Overall, the vehicle exudes luxury and performance, typical of high-end supercars seen in urban environments.
description: A gold, low-slung sports car with sharp lines, black accents, and a large rear spoiler, featuring multi-spoke black wheels and aggressive aerodynamic styling.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, sharp headlights, and wide stance with black side mirrors and a visible rear spoiler.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angular body lines, large black wheels, side air intakes, and the full length of the rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the vented engine cover, prominent rear spoiler, diffuser, and slim taillights.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angular design, black wheels, and aerodynamic features.
